tags.name: `mc-tooltip`
tags.description:
Purpose: A tooltip component for displaying informative text when users hover over, focus on, or tap an element.
Category: Forms, Actions
When to use: When you need to provide additional information about a UI element on hover, focus, or tap.
When not to use: When the information is critical and must be always visible, consider using a different UI pattern.
Works with components: mc-button, mc-icon, mc-input, mc-select, mc-checkbox
Alternative component names: Info Tooltip, Help Tooltip, Hover Text, Info Bubble, Hint

Events:

  * `show` {`CustomEvent`} - Dispatched when tooltip opens

  * `hide` {`CustomEvent`} - Dispatched when tooltip hides

Slots:

  * ` ` {} - The HTML content of the mc-tooltip.

  * ``trigger`` {} - The trigger element which toggles the tooltip. Not used when customtriggerelement property is set.

Attributes:

  * `dontflip` {`boolean`} - 

  * `dontshift` {`boolean`} - 

  * `position` {`TooltipPosition`} - Specifies the position of the tooltip in regards to the target element.

  * `appearance` {TooltipAppearance} - Appearance of the tooltip.
Can be: `neutral-default`, `neutral-inverse`

  * `fit` {`Fit`} - Fit of the tooltip.

  * `width` {`TooltipWidth`} - The max width of the tooltip in pixels.

  * `open` {`boolean`} - Sets the tooltip in the `open` state.

  * `opendelay` {`number`} - Delay(in ms) after which the tooltip will open. Only supported when the trigger is set to `hover`.

  * `zindex` {`number | undefined`} - Set only if two tooltips or a tooltip and another z-indexed panel need to overlap.

  * `customtriggerelement` {`string | HTMLElement | undefined`} - ID of the trigger element or HTMLElement reference. When set, the tooltip will attach to this element
instead of using the trigger slot. This is useful for performance optimization when many elements
need tooltips (e.g., large tables).

  * `trigger` {`string`} - Trigger event(s) for showing/hiding the tooltip.
Can be: `hover`, `focus`, `click`, `hover focus`, `hover click`, `focus click`, `hover focus click`, `manual`

Properties:

  * `dontflip` {`boolean`} - 

  * `dontshift` {`boolean`} - 

  * `contentSlot` {`HTMLElement[]`} - 

  * `hasContentSlot` {`boolean`} - 

  * `position` {`TooltipPosition`} - Specifies the position of the tooltip in regards to the target element.

  * `appearance` {TooltipAppearance} - Appearance of the tooltip.
Can be: `neutral-default`, `neutral-inverse`

  * `fit` {`Fit`} - Fit of the tooltip.

  * `width` {`TooltipWidth`} - The max width of the tooltip in pixels.

  * `open` {`boolean`} - Sets the tooltip in the `open` state.

  * `opendelay` {`number`} - Delay(in ms) after which the tooltip will open. Only supported when the trigger is set to `hover`.

  * `zindex` {`number | undefined`} - Set only if two tooltips or a tooltip and another z-indexed panel need to overlap.

  * `customtriggerelement` {`string | HTMLElement | undefined`} - ID of the trigger element or HTMLElement reference. When set, the tooltip will attach to this element
instead of using the trigger slot. This is useful for performance optimization when many elements
need tooltips (e.g., large tables).

  * `trigger` {`string`} - Trigger event(s) for showing/hiding the tooltip.
Can be: `hover`, `focus`, `click`, `hover focus`, `hover click`, `focus click`, `hover focus click`, `manual`

attributes.name: dontflip
attributes.description:
`dontflip` {`boolean`} - 

Property: dontflip

Default: false

attributes.name: dontshift
attributes.description:
`dontshift` {`boolean`} - 

Property: dontshift

Default: false

attributes.name: position
attributes.description:
`position` {`TooltipPosition`} - Specifies the position of the tooltip in regards to the target element.

Property: position

Default: top-left

attributes.name: appearance
attributes.description:
`appearance` {TooltipAppearance} - Appearance of the tooltip.
Can be: `neutral-default`, `neutral-inverse`

Property: appearance

Default: neutral-default

attributes.name: fit
attributes.description:
`fit` {`Fit`} - Fit of the tooltip.

Property: fit

Default: medium

attributes.name: width
attributes.description:
`width` {`TooltipWidth`} - The max width of the tooltip in pixels.

Property: width

Default: auto

attributes.name: open
attributes.description:
`open` {`boolean`} - Sets the tooltip in the `open` state.

Property: open

Default: false

attributes.name: opendelay
attributes.description:
`opendelay` {`number`} - Delay(in ms) after which the tooltip will open. Only supported when the trigger is set to `hover`.

Property: opendelay

Default: 50

attributes.name: zindex
attributes.description:
`zindex` {`number | undefined`} - Set only if two tooltips or a tooltip and another z-indexed panel need to overlap.

Property: zindex

attributes.name: customtriggerelement
attributes.description:
`customtriggerelement` {`string | HTMLElement | undefined`} - ID of the trigger element or HTMLElement reference. When set, the tooltip will attach to this element
instead of using the trigger slot. This is useful for performance optimization when many elements
need tooltips (e.g., large tables).

Property: customtriggerelement

attributes.name: trigger
attributes.description:
`trigger` {`string`} - Trigger event(s) for showing/hiding the tooltip.
Can be: `hover`, `focus`, `click`, `hover focus`, `hover click`, `focus click`, `hover focus click`, `manual`

Property: trigger

Default: hover focus click

attributes.name: onshow
attributes.description: `show` {`CustomEvent`} - Dispatched when tooltip opens

attributes.name: onhide
attributes.description: `hide` {`CustomEvent`} - Dispatched when tooltip hides
